tools.name: search
tools.description: Search the Islam West Africa Collection across newspaper articles, Islamic publications, archival documents, academic references, and the authority index (persons/places/organisations/events/subjects). Pass ONE concept or name — e.g. 'Tijaniyya', 'laïcité', 'Sheikh Gumi', 'pèlerinage'. Matching is a

tools.name: fetch
tools.description: Retrieve the full text and metadata of one IWAC item by an id returned from `search` (format '<category>:<number>', e.g. 'articles:28576'). Returns {id, title, text, url, metadata}: `text` is the item's OCR / abstract / description, `url` is the canonical islam.zmo.de link to cite, and `metadata` ho

tools.name: search_articles
tools.description: Search IWAC newspaper articles by keyword (title + OCR + AI abstract), country, newspaper, subject, and date range. Use French concept keywords regardless of the user's report language. Matching is accent- and case-insensitive.

tools.name: get_article
tools.description: Get one article (by id): full metadata, the AI abstract (description_ai), Gemini sentiment, and OCR text. Pass a `keyword` to get ~2000-char excerpts around each match instead of the full (capped) OCR.

tools.name: search_by_sentiment
tools.description: Filter articles by Gemini sentiment labels (accent/case-insensitive exact match).

tools.name: get_sentiment_distribution
tools.description: Aggregate Gemini polarity and centrality counts across a filter set.

tools.name: search_index
tools.description: Search the IWAC authority index (persons, places, organisations, events, subjects) by name. Accent/case-insensitive.

tools.name: get_index_entry
tools.description: Get full details of an index entry by id (raw dataset columns, French names — Titre, Prénom, Coordonnées…).

tools.name: list_subjects
tools.description: List sujets from the IWAC index, sorted by frequency (most-referenced first).

tools.name: list_locations
tools.description: List lieux from the IWAC index, sorted by frequency (most-referenced first). The optional 'country' filter selects entries that APPEAR IN records from that country (mentioned-in, not located-in), ranked by collection-wide 'frequency' — so foreign and cross-border entries can appear. Nigeria returns

tools.name: list_persons
tools.description: List personnes from the IWAC index, sorted by frequency (most-referenced first). The optional 'country' filter selects entries that APPEAR IN records from that country (mentioned-in, not located-in), ranked by collection-wide 'frequency' — so foreign and cross-border entries can appear. Nigeria retu

tools.name: get_collection_stats
tools.description: Overall statistics for all six IWAC subsets.

tools.name: get_newspaper_stats
tools.description: Per-newspaper article counts and date ranges.

tools.name: get_country_comparison
tools.description: Compare article counts, newspaper counts, date ranges, and Gemini polarity across countries.

tools.name: get_temporal_distribution
tools.description: Counts of matching items per year (or month) — the direct way to chart coverage trends over time instead of paging through search results. Defaults to articles; also works on publications, references, documents, and audiovisual. Accepts the same filters as the corresponding search_* tool (keyword =

tools.name: search_publications
tools.description: Search Islamic publications (periodical issues, books). `keyword` matches title, subject and full OCR text; use French concept keywords regardless of the user's report language. Filter by newspaper/series, subject, country and year. Use list_periodicals to discover series titles, and get_publication

tools.name: list_periodicals
tools.description: List the Islamic periodical/series titles in the publications subset, with issue counts and year ranges. Use the returned newspaper value as the `newspaper` filter on search_publications.

tools.name: get_publication_fulltext
tools.description: Full OCR text of a publication, optionally returning ~2000-char excerpts around keyword matches (accent-insensitive; capped — see match_count vs excerpts_returned).

tools.name: search_references
tools.description: Search academic references (journal articles, book chapters, theses, books, reports) by keyword and metadata. `keyword` is a single substring match over title + abstract, so search ONE term per call (combined terms like 'pèlerinage Mecque' miss results). References are multilingual: try French and E

tools.name: get_reference
tools.description: Full bibliographic record for one academic reference (by id), including the complete abstract (present for ~51% of references), subjects, DOI/URL, and host-work details (book, volume, issue, pages).

tools.name: search_documents
tools.description: Search the small archival-documents subset (~26 items: Islamic association reports, flyers, project documents — mostly Burkina Faso). Use French concept keywords regardless of the user's report language. All have OCR text and an AI description. Call with no arguments to list all.

tools.name: get_document
tools.description: Get one archival document (by id): full metadata, AI description, and OCR text. Pass a `keyword` to get ~2000-char excerpts around each match instead of the full (capped) OCR — useful for long documents.

tools.name: search_audiovisual
tools.description: Search audiovisual materials by keyword and metadata. Keyword matches title, creator, publisher, subject, spatial, language, source, and AI description where present.

tools.name: list_audiovisual
tools.description: List audiovisual materials (currently 45 Nigerian recordings, incl. Hausa/Arabic content).

tools.name: get_audiovisual
tools.description: Get one audiovisual record by id, including creator/publisher, media URL, duration, medium, subjects, places, language, source, and IWAC URL.

findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "search" is 1121 chars, far longer than this server's median (187). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.

evidence.snippet: Search the Islam West Africa Collection across newspaper articles, Islamic publications, archival documents, academic references, and the authority index (perso…

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "search" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "fetch" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.

findings.title: Description tells the model to hide behavior
findings.detail: Description of "get_temporal_distribution" instructs the model to conceal actions from the user.

evidence.snippet: Counts of matching items per year (or month) — the direct way to chart coverage trends over time instead of paging through search results. Defaults to articles;…
